verbatim_quote: It's the sign of a cult, that in order to join the cult, you have to believe something that's obviously silly, like language isn't learned. So here's two very different theories of the meaning of a word.
gloss: [ANALOGY] It's the sign of a cult, that in order to join the cult, you have to believe something that's obviously silly, like language isn't learned. So here's two very different theories...
